overview: Functional medicine practice specializing in comprehensive thyroid and autoimmune testing for women with hypothyroidism and Hashimoto's. Uses advanced testing of 20+ markers to identify root causes of thyroid dysfunction and creates personalized functional medicine treatment plans.
highlights: Lab education course and personalized lab review consultation included
targetAudience: Women with hypothyroidism or Hashimoto's experiencing persistent symptoms despite normal lab results or thyroid medication.
